portfolio.rationale: Strong semiconductor momentum with SIA reporting Q1 2026 global chip sales up 25% QoQ; sustained AI-infrastructure demand supports continued near-term outperformance.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward strongest-momentum AI/semiconductor and tech leadership where positive earnings and AI capex catalysts dominate the short window, with defense as a partially uncorrelated momentum diversifier to beat the SPY benchmark.
rationale_summary: Concentrate in high-momentum semiconductor and technology exposure backed by surging chip sales and AI spending forecasts, complemented by defense for diversification.
